output.title: Landlord Withholding Your Security Deposit? Demand It Back in 60 Seconds
output.meta_description: Is your landlord withholding your security deposit? Learn your tenant rights and send a legally valid demand letter in 60 seconds for only $19.99.
content_outline: The Silent Epidemic: Why Landlords Illegally Withhold Security Deposits
Know Your Rights: State Timelines and What Landlords Can Actually Deduct
Normal Wear & Tear vs. Damage: Are You Being Wrongfully Charged?
The 60-Second Solution: How to Send a Demand Letter Without a Lawyer
Next Steps: What to Do If Your Landlord Still Refuses to Return Your Money
key_points: Landlords must return security deposits within state-mandated timelines (typically 14–45 days) and provide itemized deductions
Normal wear and tear, such as minor carpet wear or faded paint, is not a legally valid reason to withhold a deposit
A formal letter of demand is the most effective first step to recover withheld funds before pursuing small claims court
Deposits-Back.com generates a state-specific security deposit demand letter in 60 seconds for a one-time $19.99 fee with no sign-up or subscription
output.cta: Don't let your landlord keep what's yours. Create your state-specific security deposit demand letter at Deposits-Back.com in 60 seconds for just $19.99. No sign-up. No subscription. Just results.
output.target_audience: Frustrated US renters whose landlords are withholding, delaying, or wrongfully deducting from their security deposit after move-out
